name: Computer Lab
hints: Computer lab with the Ringmaster villain and a computer terminal with a knob.
TYPE RUN to execute a program. GO COMP drops items and enters the computer. Beware the Ringmaster's hypnosis.
TYPE RUN runs a program. Plain TYPE gives SYNTAX ERROR. GO COMP drops items. EAST to hall (room 16). Deal with the Ringmaster.
notes: Computer lab with Ringmaster villain. TYPE RUN executes program. GO COMP enters computer (drops items). EAST to hall (room 16).
